messages.content: SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.total_amount > (SELECT AVG(total_amount) FROM orders)
SELECT name FROM products WHERE product_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM order_items)

SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.customer_id IN (SELECT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'Electronics')
SELECT p1.name, p1.price FROM products p1 WHERE p1.price > (SELECT AVG(p2.price) FROM products p2 WHERE p2.category = p1.category)

SELECT DISTINCT c1.name FROM customers c1 WHERE (SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c1.customer_id) > (SELECT AVG(country_total) FROM (SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) as country_total FROM customers c2 JOIN orders o ON c2.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE c2.country = c1.country GROUP BY c2.customer_id))
SELECT DISTINCT o.order_id FROM orders o WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id AND p.price > 100)

SELECT p.name FROM products p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.product_id = p.product_id) > (SELECT AVG(order_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as order_count FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id))
SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id AND o.status != 'completed')
SELECT DISTINCT c.country FROM customers c WHERE c.customer_id IN (SELECT o.customer_id FROM orders o GROUP BY o.customer_id HAVING SUM(o.total_amount) > 5000)
SELECT p1.name, p1.stock_count FROM products p1 WHERE p1.stock_count < (SELECT AVG(p2.stock_count) FROM products p2 WHERE p2.category = p1.category)

SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT p.product_id FROM products p WHERE p.category = 'Electronics' AND p.product_id NOT IN (SELECT oi.product_id FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id))

SELECT o.order_id, o.total_amount FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.total_amount > (SELECT AVG(o2.total_amount) FROM orders o2 JOIN customers c2 ON o2.customer_id = c2.customer_id WHERE c2.country = c.country)

SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id) > (SELECT AVG(order_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id))
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p WHERE p.product_id IN (SELECT oi.product_id FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'pending')
SELECT name FROM customers WHERE join_date > (SELECT MIN(order_date) FROM orders)
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products WHERE category IN (SELECT category FROM products GROUP BY category HAVING AVG(price) > 50)
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.product_id = p.product_id AND oi.quantity > p.stock_count)

SELECT name FROM customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'Books')
SELECT p1.name, p1.category, p1.price FROM products p1 WHERE p1.price = (SELECT MAX(p2.price) FROM products p2 WHERE p2.category = p1.category)

SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.country = 'USA' AND (SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id) > (SELECT MAX(total_spent) FROM (SELECT SUM(o2.total_amount) as total_spent FROM customers c2 JOIN orders o2 ON c2.customer_id = o2.customer_id WHERE c2.country = 'Canada' GROUP BY c2.customer_id))
SELECT DISTINCT order_date FROM orders WHERE order_date IN (SELECT order_date FROM orders GROUP BY order_date HAVING COUNT(*) > 5)
SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE (SELECT AVG(o.total_amount) FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id) > 200
SELECT name, price FROM products WHERE price > (SELECT MAX(price) FROM products WHERE category = 'Books') AND category != 'Books'

SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.category) FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id) >= 3
SELECT name, price FROM products WHERE price < (SELECT AVG(price) FROM products)
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products WHERE category IN (SELECT category FROM products WHERE stock_count = 0)

SELECT DISTINCT o.order_id FROM orders o WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id) > (SELECT AVG(item_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as item_count FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id))
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p WHERE (SELECT MAX(oi.quantity) FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.product_id = p.product_id) > 100
SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date)) FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id) > 1
SELECT p.name FROM products p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = p.product_id) > 10

SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE (SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id) >= (SELECT total FROM (SELECT SUM(total_amount) as total FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY total DESC) LIMIT 1 OFFSET (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM orders) / 4)
SELECT name FROM products WHERE category = 'Clothing' AND price > (SELECT MAX(price) FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics')
SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.country IN (SELECT c2.country FROM customers c2 JOIN orders o ON c2.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c2.country HAVING AVG(o.total_amount) > 500)
SELECT DISTINCT o.order_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = (SELECT product_id FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.product_id = p.product_id AND oi.unit_price != p.price)

SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id AND o.total_amount > (SELECT AVG(o2.total_amount) FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.customer_id = c.customer_id))

SELECT p.name FROM products p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.country) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE oi.product_id = p.product_id) >= 5
SELECT p1.name, p1.category, p1.price FROM products p1 WHERE p1.price = (SELECT MIN(p2.price) FROM products p2 WHERE p2.category = p1.category)

SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id AND o.status = 'pending') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id)
SELECT name FROM products WHERE stock_count > 0 AND product_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM order_items)
SELECT DISTINCT s1.name FROM students s1 WHERE s1.gpa > (SELECT AVG(s2.gpa) FROM students s2 WHERE s2.major = s1.major)
SELECT name FROM students WHERE student_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT student_id FROM enrollments)

SELECT c.title FROM courses c WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments e WHERE e.course_id = c.course_id) > (SELECT AVG(enrollment_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as enrollment_count FROM enrollments GROUP BY course_id))

SELECT s.name FROM students s WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT c.course_id FROM courses c WHERE c.department = 'Computer Science' AND c.course_id NOT IN (SELECT e.course_id FROM enrollments e WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id))

SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM professors p WHERE p.name IN (SELECT c.instructor FROM courses c WHERE c.course_id IN (SELECT e.course_id FROM enrollments e JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE s.gpa > 3.5))

SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM students s WHERE (SELECT SUM(c.credits) FROM enrollments e JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id) > (SELECT AVG(total_credits) FROM (SELECT SUM(c.credits) as total_credits FROM students s2 JOIN enrollments e2 ON s2.student_id = e2.student_id JOIN courses c ON e2.course_id = c.course_id WHERE s2.enrollment_year = s.enrollment_year GROUP BY s2.student_id))
SELECT DISTINCT major FROM students WHERE major IN (SELECT major FROM students GROUP BY major HAVING AVG(gpa) > 3.0)
SELECT title FROM courses WHERE course_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT course_id FROM enrollments WHERE grade = 'A')
SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM students s WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.department) FROM enrollments e JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id) > 1
SELECT c.title FROM courses c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enrollments e JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE e.course_id = c.course_id AND s.gpa <= 3.0)
SELECT name FROM students WHERE gpa > (SELECT MAX(gpa) FROM students WHERE major = 'History') AND major != 'History'

SELECT DISTINCT department FROM courses WHERE department IN (SELECT department FROM courses GROUP BY department HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(course_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as course_count FROM courses GROUP BY department)))
SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM students s WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.department) FROM enrollments e JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id) >= 3
SELECT name FROM students WHERE enrollment_year > (SELECT MIN(tenure_year) FROM professors)
SELECT DISTINCT c.title FROM courses c WHERE c.instructor IN (SELECT p.name FROM professors p WHERE (2024 - p.tenure_year) > 10)
SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM students s WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enrollments e WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.grade = 'A')
SELECT DISTINCT major FROM students WHERE major NOT IN (SELECT major FROM students WHERE gpa < 2.5)
SELECT c1.title, c1.credits FROM courses c1 WHERE c1.credits > (SELECT AVG(c2.credits) FROM courses c2 WHERE c2.department = c1.department)

SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM students s WHERE s.student_id IN (SELECT e.student_id FROM enrollments e WHERE e.course_id IN (SELECT e2.course_id FROM enrollments e2 JOIN students s2 ON e2.student_id = s2.student_id GROUP BY e2.course_id HAVING AVG(s2.gpa) > 3.5))

SELECT s.name FROM students s WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments e WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id) > (SELECT AVG(course_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as course_count FROM enrollments GROUP BY student_id))
SELECT DISTINCT semester FROM enrollments WHERE semester IN (SELECT semester FROM enrollments GROUP BY semester HAVING COUNT(*) > 100)
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM professors p WHERE p.department IN (SELECT s.major FROM students s GROUP BY s.major HAVING AVG(s.gpa) > 3.3)
SELECT s1.name FROM students s1 WHERE ABS(s1.gpa - (SELECT AVG(s2.gpa) FROM students s2 WHERE s2.major = s1.major)) <= 0.5
SELECT c.title FROM courses c WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.major) FROM enrollments e JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE e.course_id = c.course_id) >= 4

SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM students s WHERE s.student_id IN (SELECT student_id FROM enrollments) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enrollments e WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.grade IN ('C', 'D', 'F'))
SELECT DISTINCT instructor FROM courses WHERE instructor IN (SELECT instructor FROM courses GROUP BY instructor HAVING SUM(credits) > 12)
SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM students s JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id WHERE e.course_id IN (SELECT course_id FROM courses WHERE credits = (SELECT MAX(credits) FROM courses))
SELECT DISTINCT department FROM courses WHERE department IN (SELECT department FROM courses GROUP BY department HAVING AVG(credits) < 3)
SELECT s.name FROM students s WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enrollments e JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id AND c.department != s.major)
SELECT name FROM students WHERE enrollment_year = (SELECT enrollment_year FROM students GROUP BY enrollment_year ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT c.title FROM courses c WHERE (SELECT MIN(s.gpa) FROM enrollments e JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE e.course_id = c.course_id) > 3.0
SELECT name FROM students WHERE gpa > (SELECT AVG(gpa) FROM students)

SELECT DISTINCT c.department FROM courses c WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.major) FROM enrollments e JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE e.course_id = c.course_id) = (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT major) FROM students)
SELECT title FROM courses WHERE course_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT course_id FROM enrollments)

SELECT s.name FROM students s WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments e WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.grade = 'A') > (SELECT AVG(a_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as a_count FROM enrollments WHERE grade = 'A' GROUP BY student_id))

SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM professors p WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM courses c WHERE c.instructor = p.name AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments e WHERE e.course_id = c.course_id) > (SELECT AVG(enroll_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as enroll_count FROM courses c2 JOIN enrollments e2 ON c2.course_id = e2.course_id WHERE c2.department = c.department GROUP BY c2.course_id)))
SELECT s.name FROM students s WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT DISTINCT e1.semester FROM enrollments e1 WHERE e1.semester NOT IN (SELECT e2.semester FROM enrollments e2 WHERE e2.student_id = s.student_id))
SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM students s WHERE s.major IN (SELECT department FROM courses GROUP BY department HAVING COUNT(*) > 5)
SELECT c.title FROM courses c WHERE c.instructor IN (SELECT name FROM professors WHERE tenure_year = (SELECT MIN(tenure_year) FROM professors))
SELECT s1.name FROM students s1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM students s2 WHERE s2.student_id != s1.student_id AND s2.major = s1.major AND s2.gpa = s1.gpa)

SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id) > (SELECT AVG(appt_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as appt_count FROM appointments GROUP BY patient_id))
SELECT name FROM doctors WHERE doctor_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT a.doctor_id FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr ON a.appt_id = pr.appt_id)
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.specialty) FROM appointments a JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id) > 1

SELECT d1.name FROM doctors d1 WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments a WHERE a.doctor_id = d1.doctor_id) > (SELECT AVG(appt_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as appt_count FROM doctors d2 JOIN appointments a ON d2.doctor_id = a.doctor_id WHERE d2.specialty = d1.specialty GROUP BY d2.doctor_id))
SELECT name FROM patients WHERE patient_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr ON a.appt_id = pr.appt_id)

SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE p.blood_type = 'O' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id AND d.specialty = 'Cardiology')

SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE p.patient_id IN (SELECT a.patient_id FROM appointments a WHERE a.diagnosis IN (SELECT diagnosis FROM appointments GROUP BY diagnosis HAVING COUNT(*) > 10))

SELECT DISTINCT medication FROM prescriptions WHERE medication IN (SELECT medication FROM prescriptions GROUP BY medication HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(med_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as med_count FROM prescriptions GROUP BY medication)))
SELECT p.name FROM patients p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.specialty) FROM appointments a JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id) = 1

SELECT d.name FROM doctors d WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT DISTINCT p.gender FROM patients p WHERE p.gender NOT IN (SELECT p2.gender FROM appointments a JOIN patients p2 ON a.patient_id = p2.patient_id WHERE a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id))

SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id) > (SELECT MAX(appt_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as appt_count FROM appointments a JOIN patients p2 ON a.patient_id = p2.patient_id WHERE p2.blood_type = 'AB' GROUP BY p2.patient_id))
SELECT DISTINCT a.diagnosis FROM appointments a WHERE a.appt_id IN (SELECT pr.appt_id FROM prescriptions pr GROUP BY pr.appt_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pr.medication) > 1)

SELECT d.name FROM doctors d WHERE (SELECT AVG(CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.dob) AS INTEGER)) FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id) > 50
SELECT p.name FROM patients p WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT a.appt_id FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id AND a.appt_id NOT IN (SELECT appt_id FROM prescriptions))

SELECT DISTINCT specialty FROM doctors WHERE specialty NOT IN (SELECT d.specialty FROM doctors d JOIN appointments a ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id JOIN prescriptions pr ON a.appt_id = pr.appt_id WHERE pr.medication = 'Aspirin')

SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE p.patient_id IN (SELECT a.patient_id FROM appointments a WHERE a.date IN (SELECT date FROM appointments GROUP BY date HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) > 1))

SELECT DISTINCT d.name FROM doctors d WHERE d.doctor_id IN (SELECT a.doctor_id FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE p.blood_type = (SELECT blood_type FROM patients GROUP BY blood_type ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1))
SELECT DISTINCT a.appt_id FROM appointments a WHERE a.diagnosis IN (SELECT diagnosis FROM appointments GROUP BY diagnosis HAVING COUNT(*) < 5)

SELECT p.name FROM patients p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.doctor_id) FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id) > (SELECT AVG(doc_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT doctor_id) as doc_count FROM appointments GROUP BY patient_id))
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE p.gender = 'M' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id)

SELECT d1.name FROM doctors d1 WHERE d1.specialty = 'Cardiology' AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a1.patient_id) FROM appointments a1 WHERE a1.doctor_id = d1.doctor_id) > (SELECT AVG(patient_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a2.patient_id) as patient_count FROM doctors d2 JOIN appointments a2 ON d2.doctor_id = a2.doctor_id WHERE d2.specialty != 'Cardiology' GROUP BY d2.doctor_id))
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.department) FROM appointments a JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id) > 1
SELECT pr1.medication, pr1.duration FROM prescriptions pr1 WHERE LENGTH(pr1.duration) > (SELECT AVG(LENGTH(pr2.duration)) FROM prescriptions pr2 WHERE pr2.medication = pr1.medication)
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE p.dob > '1990-01-01' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id)
SELECT d.name FROM doctors d WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pr.medication) FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr ON a.appt_id = pr.appt_id WHERE a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id) > 10

SELECT DISTINCT department FROM doctors WHERE department IN (SELECT department FROM doctors GROUP BY department HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(doc_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as doc_count FROM doctors GROUP BY department)))

SELECT p.name FROM patients p WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT d.doctor_id FROM doctors d WHERE d.department = 'Cardiology' AND d.doctor_id NOT IN (SELECT a.doctor_id FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id))
SELECT DISTINCT a.diagnosis FROM appointments a WHERE a.doctor_id IN (SELECT doctor_id FROM doctors WHERE department = 'Emergency')

SELECT p.name FROM patients p WHERE p.blood_type = 'A' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr ON a.appt_id = pr.appt_id WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id) > (SELECT AVG(med_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as med_count FROM appointments a2 JOIN prescriptions pr2 ON a2.appt_id = pr2.appt_id GROUP BY a2.patient_id))

SELECT d.name FROM doctors d WHERE d.specialty = (SELECT d2.specialty FROM doctors d2 JOIN appointments a ON d2.doctor_id = a.doctor_id GROUP BY d2.specialty ORDER BY COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT d2.doctor_id) DESC LIMIT 1)

SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a1 JOIN appointments a2 ON a1.patient_id = a2.patient_id WHERE a1.patient_id = p.patient_id AND date(a2.date) = date(a1.date, '+1 day'))

SELECT pr.medication FROM prescriptions pr WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT d.department FROM doctors d WHERE d.department NOT IN (SELECT d2.department FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr2 ON a.appt_id = pr2.appt_id JOIN doctors d2 ON a.doctor_id = d2.doctor_id WHERE pr2.medication = pr.medication)) GROUP BY pr.medication
SELECT name FROM patients WHERE blood_type = (SELECT blood_type FROM patients GROUP BY blood_type ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)

SELECT DISTINCT d1.name FROM doctors d1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a1 JOIN doctors d2 ON a1.doctor_id = d2.doctor_id WHERE d1.doctor_id != d2.doctor_id AND d1.department = d2.department AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a2 WHERE a2.doctor_id = d1.doctor_id AND a2.diagnosis = a1.diagnosis))
SELECT name FROM patients WHERE patient_id NOT IN (SELECT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id WHERE d.department = 'Surgery')
SELECT DISTINCT date FROM appointments WHERE date IN (SELECT date FROM appointments GROUP BY date HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT doctor_id) > 5)

SELECT d.specialty, a.diagnosis FROM doctors d JOIN appointments a ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments a2 JOIN doctors d2 ON a2.doctor_id = d2.doctor_id WHERE d2.specialty = d.specialty AND a2.diagnosis = a.diagnosis) = (SELECT MAX(diag_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as diag_count FROM appointments a3 JOIN doctors d3 ON a3.doctor_id = d3.doctor_id WHERE d3.specialty = d.specialty GROUP BY a3.diagnosis)) GROUP BY d.specialty, a.diagnosis
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.doctor_id) FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr ON a.appt_id = pr.appt_id WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id) > 1

SELECT d.name FROM doctors d WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.blood_type) FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id) = (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT blood_type) FROM patients)

SELECT p.name FROM patients p WHERE (SELECT a1.doctor_id FROM appointments a1 WHERE a1.patient_id = p.patient_id ORDER BY a1.date ASC LIMIT 1) != (SELECT a2.doctor_id FROM appointments a2 WHERE a2.patient_id = p.patient_id ORDER BY a2.date DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT DISTINCT country FROM customers
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products
SELECT DISTINCT status FROM orders
SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
SELECT DISTINCT order_date FROM orders ORDER BY order_date
SELECT DISTINCT c.email FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'completed'

SELECT DISTINCT p.category FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.country = 'USA'
SELECT DISTINCT c.country FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.total_amount > 1000
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics' ORDER BY name
SELECT DISTINCT email FROM customers
SELECT DISTINCT price FROM products ORDER BY price
SELECT DISTINCT strftime('%Y', order_date) as year FROM orders
SELECT DISTINCT major FROM students
SELECT DISTINCT department FROM courses
SELECT DISTINCT grade FROM enrollments
SELECT DISTINCT semester FROM enrollments ORDER BY semester
SELECT DISTINCT instructor FROM courses
SELECT DISTINCT enrollment_year FROM students ORDER BY enrollment_year
SELECT DISTINCT c.department FROM courses c JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM students s JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id WHERE e.grade = 'A'
SELECT DISTINCT major FROM students WHERE gpa > 3.5
SELECT DISTINCT c.title FROM courses c JOIN professors p ON c.instructor = p.name WHERE p.department = 'Computer Science'
SELECT DISTINCT credits FROM courses ORDER BY credits
SELECT DISTINCT course_id FROM courses
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM professors
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM students
SELECT DISTINCT blood_type FROM patients
SELECT DISTINCT specialty FROM doctors
SELECT DISTINCT department FROM doctors
SELECT DISTINCT diagnosis FROM appointments
SELECT DISTINCT medication FROM prescriptions
SELECT DISTINCT gender FROM patients
SELECT DISTINCT date FROM appointments ORDER BY date
SELECT DISTINCT dosage FROM prescriptions
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id
SELECT DISTINCT d.name FROM doctors d JOIN appointments a ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id JOIN prescriptions pr ON a.appt_id = pr.appt_id
SELECT DISTINCT duration FROM prescriptions
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM patients
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM doctors

SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM products)

SELECT DISTINCT p.category FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING SUM(total_amount) > 5000)
SELECT DISTINCT order_date FROM orders WHERE order_id IN (SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE total_amount > 2 * (SELECT AVG(total_amount) FROM orders))

SELECT DISTINCT c.country FROM customers c WHERE c.customer_id IN (SELECT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY o.customer_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.category) > 3)
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p WHERE p.product_id NOT IN (SELECT oi.product_id FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'pending')
SELECT DISTINCT c.email FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.total_amount > (SELECT AVG(total_amount) FROM orders)
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products WHERE product_id IN (SELECT product_id FROM products WHERE stock_count < (SELECT AVG(stock_count) FROM products))
SELECT DISTINCT o.status FROM orders o WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id AND p.price > 100)

SELECT DISTINCT c.country FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = (SELECT product_id FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.product_id = p.product_id) > 10
SELECT DISTINCT o.order_date FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE join_date > '2020-01-01')

SELECT DISTINCT p.category FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.customer_id = (SELECT customer_id FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY SUM(total_amount) DESC LIMIT 1)

SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.country IN (SELECT c2.country FROM customers c2 JOIN orders o ON c2.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c2.country HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT country) FROM orders o2 JOIN customers c3 ON o2.customer_id = c3.customer_id))

SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM students s JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id WHERE e.course_id IN (SELECT course_id FROM enrollments GROUP BY course_id HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(enroll_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as enroll_count FROM enrollments GROUP BY course_id)))
SELECT DISTINCT c.department FROM courses c WHERE c.course_id IN (SELECT e.course_id FROM enrollments e JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE s.gpa > 3.7)
SELECT DISTINCT s.major FROM students s WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.department) FROM enrollments e JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id) >= 2
SELECT DISTINCT instructor FROM courses WHERE credits > (SELECT AVG(credits) FROM courses)

SELECT DISTINCT e.semester FROM enrollments e JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE s.major = 'Computer Science' AND e.grade = 'A' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enrollments e2 JOIN students s2 ON e2.student_id = s2.student_id WHERE e2.semester = e.semester AND s2.major = 'Computer Science' AND e2.grade != 'A')
SELECT DISTINCT c.title FROM courses c JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE s.gpa > (SELECT AVG(gpa) FROM students)
SELECT DISTINCT major FROM students WHERE major IN (SELECT major FROM students WHERE gpa = 4.0)
SELECT DISTINCT c.department FROM courses c WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enrollments e JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE e.course_id = c.course_id AND s.gpa > 3.8)

SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM students s WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT c.course_id FROM courses c WHERE c.credits = 4 AND c.course_id NOT IN (SELECT e.course_id FROM enrollments e WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id))

SELECT DISTINCT s.enrollment_year FROM students s JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id WHERE e.course_id IN (SELECT course_id FROM enrollments GROUP BY course_id HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(c) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM enrollments GROUP BY course_id)))
SELECT DISTINCT instructor FROM courses WHERE credits >= (SELECT credits FROM courses ORDER BY credits DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses) / 4)
SELECT DISTINCT e.course_id FROM enrollments e WHERE e.student_id IN (SELECT student_id FROM enrollments WHERE student_id NOT IN (SELECT student_id FROM enrollments WHERE grade = 'C'))
SELECT DISTINCT s.major FROM students s JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.instructor IN (SELECT name FROM professors)
SELECT DISTINCT semester FROM enrollments WHERE semester IN (SELECT semester FROM enrollments GROUP BY semester HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT semester) FROM enrollments))

SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id WHERE d.specialty IN (SELECT d2.specialty FROM doctors d2 JOIN appointments a2 ON d2.doctor_id = a2.doctor_id GROUP BY d2.specialty HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(appt_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as appt_count FROM appointments GROUP BY doctor_id)))

SELECT DISTINCT d.specialty FROM doctors d WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id AND p.blood_type IN (SELECT blood_type FROM patients GROUP BY blood_type HAVING COUNT(*) < 10))

SELECT DISTINCT pr.medication FROM prescriptions pr JOIN appointments a ON pr.appt_id = a.appt_id WHERE a.doctor_id IN (SELECT doctor_id FROM appointments GROUP BY doctor_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) > (SELECT AVG(patient_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) as patient_count FROM appointments GROUP BY doctor_id)))

SELECT DISTINCT a.diagnosis FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id IN (SELECT patient_id FROM appointments GROUP BY patient_id HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(appt_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as appt_count FROM appointments GROUP BY patient_id)))

SELECT DISTINCT d.department FROM doctors d WHERE d.doctor_id IN (SELECT a.doctor_id FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr ON a.appt_id = pr.appt_id WHERE pr.duration LIKE '%30 days%' OR pr.duration LIKE '%60 days%' OR pr.duration LIKE '%90 days%')

SELECT DISTINCT p.blood_type FROM patients p WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id AND a.doctor_id IN (SELECT doctor_id FROM appointments GROUP BY doctor_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 20))

SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM patients p WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr ON a.appt_id = pr.appt_id WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id) > (SELECT AVG(med_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as med_count FROM appointments a2 JOIN prescriptions pr2 ON a2.appt_id = pr2.appt_id GROUP BY a2.patient_id))

SELECT DISTINCT d.specialty FROM doctors d WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id AND (CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.dob) AS INTEGER)) < 30)

SELECT DISTINCT medication FROM prescriptions WHERE medication IN (SELECT medication FROM prescriptions GROUP BY medication HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT medication) FROM prescriptions))
SELECT DISTINCT a.date FROM appointments a WHERE a.appt_id IN (SELECT appt_id FROM prescriptions GROUP BY appt_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)

SELECT DISTINCT d.name FROM doctors d WHERE d.department IN (SELECT department FROM doctors GROUP BY department HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(doc_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as doc_count FROM doctors GROUP BY department)))

SELECT DISTINCT p.gender FROM patients p WHERE p.patient_id IN (SELECT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr ON a.appt_id = pr.appt_id WHERE pr.medication = (SELECT medication FROM prescriptions GROUP BY medication ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1))

SELECT DISTINCT a.diagnosis FROM appointments a WHERE a.doctor_id IN (SELECT doctor_id FROM doctors WHERE department = (SELECT department FROM doctors GROUP BY department ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1))
